chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-905 of 2023 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objection at flag `A` 2. For hearing of main case 09-08-2023 Mr. Arshad Mehmood Sundrani, Advocate for the Petitioner Mr. Mujeeb-u-Rehman Soomro, Special Prosecutor NAB Mr. Dareshani Ali Haider ‘Ada’, Deputy Attorney General.-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- This petition has been filed for return of passport which was deposited by petitioner with the Additional Registrar of this Court in terms of order dated 13.12.2016 in CP No.D-5253/2016 filed by him for pre-arrest bail. Subsequently, after a trial, petitioner was convicted and sentenced to suffer seven years imprisonment by learned Accountability Court at Sukkur. He filed appeal before this court against the impugned judgment but his appeal was dismissed by this court and ultimately he ended up before the Supreme Court in appeal. The Supreme Court has suspended sentence of the petitioner and he is presently on bail. In view of this background, learned Special Prosecutor NAB so also DAG have recorded no objection to return the passport to the petitioner. Accordingly this petition is allowed. Let the passport of the petitioner be returned to him by the office of Additional Registrar of this Court on due verification. Office is directed to place on record a copy of the order dated 13.12.2016 passed in CP.No.D-5253/2016, in this petition. JUDGE JUDGE Sulemen Khan/PA
